version_description: From 2023. Link to the song: https://youtu.be/2tDQUDz7m1A.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
BURN IT DOWN
As recorded by Parker McCollum
(From the 2023 Album NEVER ENOUGH)



[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Goodbye, strung out on the lawn[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
The line between us was drawn[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Asus4[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
All I can see is you're gone and you left me here[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Asus4[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
With this house on this ground, burn it down[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
I'll leave my memories inside[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
In that bed, we loved in all night[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Every word, every fight[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Asus4[/ch]
Every feelin', stone cold, not a sound[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Asus4[/ch]
Burn it down 'til it's ashes and smoke[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Asus4[/ch]
Burn it down to the smolderin' coals[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Asus4[/ch]
Burn it down 'til I don't want you no more[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, burn it down[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Every last song that I wrote[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
About me and you growing old[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Asus4[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Every sliver of hope everything I know[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Asus4[/ch]
Pile it up right now[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Asus4[/ch]
Burn it down 'til it's ashes and smoke[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Asus4[/ch]
Burn it down to the smolderin' coals[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Asus4[/ch]
Burn it down 'til I don't want you no more[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, burn it down[/tab]


[Guitar Solo]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Asus4[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Asus4[/ch]
Burn it down (Burn it, burn it, burn it)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Asus4[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
Burn it down (Burn it, burn it, burn it)[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Asus4[/ch]
Burn it down 'til it's ashes and smoke[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Asus4[/ch]
Burn it down to the smolderin' coals[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Asus4[/ch]
Burn it down 'til I don't want you no more[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, burn it down (Burn it, burn it, burn it)[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Asus4[/ch]
Burn it down (Burn it, burn it, burn it)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Asus4[/ch]
Burn it down (Burn it, burn it, burn it)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
Burn it down (Burn it, burn it, burn it)[/tab]
